# Piedmont Dental By Design

> A small, intentional cosmetic and restorative dental practice on Grand Avenue in Piedmont, California. Led by Dr. Jill Martenson, DDS, since 2000. Voted Best Esthetic Dentist 2024 by Best of the East Bay readers.

## Practice

- **Name:** Piedmont Dental By Design
- **Address:** 1331 Grand Ave, Piedmont, CA 94610
- **Phone:** (510) 350-3937
- **Founded:** 2000
- **Website:** https://piedmontdentalbydesign.com
- **Service area:** Piedmont, Oakland, Lake Merritt, Montclair, Rockridge, Berkeley

## Hours

- Monday & Wednesday: 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Tuesday & Thursday: 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM
- Friday – Sunday: closed

## Practitioners

- **Dr. Jill A. Martenson, DDS** — Lead dentist, cosmetic dentistry. Founded the practice in 2000. Voted Best Esthetic Dentist 2024 (Best of the East Bay).
- **Dr. Filippo Cangini** — Periodontics
- **Dr. David Ma** — Restorative dentistry

## Services

### Cosmetic
- Porcelain veneers (custom porcelain, 2–3 visits)
- Tooth whitening (in-office and take-home)
- Invisalign clear aligners (3D-planned, 6–18 months)
- Smile design

### Restorative
- Dental implants
- CEREC same-day crowns
- Composite fillings
- Porcelain crowns
- Bridges and dentures
- Full mouth restoration

### Periodontal
- Gum disease treatment and maintenance
- Gum and bone grafting
- Crown lengthening
- Scaling and root planing
- Sinus augmentation

### Cleanings & Prevention
- Comprehensive exams
- Cleanings
- Digital and panoramic X-rays
- Fluoride treatment
- Home-care guidance

## Trust Signals

- Best Esthetic Dentist 2024 — Best of the East Bay
- 4.9 / 5 rating from 344 Google reviews
- Member of the American Academy of Cosmetic Dentistry (AACD), American Dental Association (ADA), and California Dental Association (CDA)
- Practicing continuously in Piedmont since 2000
- Currently accepting new patients

## Insurance & Financing

- Most insurance plans accepted
- Financing available for treatments not fully covered

## Booking

- Online: https://piedmontdentalbydesign.com#booker
- Phone: (510) 350-3937 during open hours

## Patient Resources

- Patient Forms: complete new patient paperwork online (Dental Symphony portal)
- Post-Op Instructions: care after procedures
- Account Access: view statements, treatment history, balance
- Referral Portal: for referring dental practices (Dental Symphony)
- Dental Videos: educational videos by procedure
- Smile Analysis: interactive cosmetic treatment recommender
- Smile Gallery: before/after results by procedure (Invisalign, full mouth, cosmetic, gummy smile, restorations)
- Insurance: plans accepted, coverage verification
- Financing: payment plans for treatments not fully covered

## Practice Team (full)

### Dentists
- Dr. Jill A. Martenson, DDS — Owner & lead dentist · cosmetic dentistry · 29 years experience
- Dr. Filippo Cangini — Periodontics
- Dr. David Ma — Restorative dentistry

### Hygienists

- Kelley — Registered Dental Hygienist
- Cesar — Registered Dental Hygienist

### Dental Assistants
- Lee'Lannee — Expanded Function Dental Assistant 2
- Debra — Registered Dental Assistant
- Susana — Registered Dental Assistant

### Practice Operations
- Christine — Patient Services Manager · RDA
- Elaina — Financial, Treatment & Business Manager

## Practice Values

1. High standards in personalized dental care
2. Education & prevention focus
3. Positive patient experience
4. Modern technology (digital radiography reduces radiation 80–90%)
5. Continuous training & expertise (AACD/ADA/CDA active members)
6. Uncompromising safety (ADA/OSHA/CDC sterilization protocols)
